## How it was verified

<!-- What did you run/test? -->

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally (lint → typecheck → test → build)
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests (or explain why not)
- [ ] Changes are additive/backward-compatible where they touch the database or shared analytics types
